title: Machine learning applications for dynamic, quantitative assessment of human resources
abstract: Systems and methods that include characterizing individual team members in terms of specified "character elements" or attributes, and combining the individual characterizations into an aggregate characterization of the team. The team evaluation does not merely sum individual attributes; rather, it analyzes the composition of the team relative to predetermined metrics, taking into account what combinations of individual team member attributes are more likely to lead to success of the team.
